title: Guimi Zhi Zhu Tebie Pian: Liewu

synonyms: Lord of The Mysteries Special: Prey
alternative_titles.ja: 诡秘之主特别篇: 猎物​

synopsis:
Qilangos, one of the Seven Pirate Admirals, has arrived in Backlund. Alger strikes a deal with  Audrey to get her to use her connections to find more information on Qilangos' whereabouts, and hopes that the Fool can help him kill the Pirate Admiral.

This is a side story about the Tarot Club's first mission, taken place after Klein and Azik visit Lamud Town and before the investigation of Madam Sharon.
